Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 51 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}Yeah, what's up? You look like a zombie.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 4 51 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}Y-You're like that coach who fell asleep during the championship game![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 3 51 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 3 25 25}Come on, man. You're s'posed to be our leader.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}They don't seem to see the door.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 51 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}Cut him some slack. If nothing's wrong, then let's get going.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}They don't seem to see the door.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 51 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}Have you been nodding off? You seem kinda out of it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 3 51 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}Dude, you're s'posed to be our leader. Get your head in the game![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 51 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}We'll be following you. Come on, let's go.[n]{f 1 1}
